purpose: Canonical enum-like vocabulary for champion execution resolution timing and item activation cadence semantics in data-first authoring.

resolution_timing_enum.meaning: Effect resolution occurs at cast completion, without waiting for a subsequent empowered basic-attack contact.
Cast primes an empowered basic attack; effect resolution occurs only when that empowered hit lands.
Primed effect can resolve either on empowered basic-attack hit or on an allowed ability-hit consume path.
Two-phase model: cast immediately applies self-state/buff, while combat payload resolves on empowered basic-attack hit.
Two-phase model: cast-time dash/reposition occurs first, then combat payload resolves on empowered basic-attack hit.

activation_cadence_model_enum.meaning: Activation is primarily cadence-limited by a fixed cooldown (`cooldown_seconds`).
Activation consumes one or more charges; cadence is governed by charge stock and recharge behavior.
Activation consumes the item instance; no reusable fixed cooldown applies.
Activation is single-use and transforms the item into a replacement state/item after use.
Activation cadence is limited by per-round usage caps rather than fixed cooldown timers.
